app_info.subtitle: Research Spanish law
app_info.description: Spanish Law Research helps users find Spanish legislation, inspect law metadata and article text, retrieve source-grounded excerpts, and review reform history with citations to Legalize, legalize-es, BOE, and source URLs. The app is a read-only legal research assistant and does not provide legal advice, submit forms, or change any government or third-party system.

justifications.read_only_justification: Searches the local indexed Spanish legislation database and returns matching citations without modifying stored records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state, submit forms, or change third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves metadata for an indexed law from the local database without modifying records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or change external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves bounded article text and citation metadata from the local indexed corpus without changing data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not submit, post, or modify information outside the app.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Searches within one indexed law and returns bounded excerpts without modifying records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not change public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists reform history records from the local database without creating or updating records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish, submit, or mutate data in external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.user_prompt: Find Spanish laws about personal data protection.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns relevant Spanish law citations with source URLs and short matched snippets.

test_cases.description: Retrieve metadata for a known BOE law identifier.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the law citation, title, jurisdiction, status, source revision, and available metadata without article text.

test_cases.description: Retrieve a bounded article from a known law.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns Article 1 with citation metadata and indicates whether the text was truncated.

test_cases.description: Find source-grounded excerpts inside a known law.
test_cases.user_prompt: In BOE-A-2018-16673, find excerpts about the data protection officer.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns bounded excerpts from the specified law with article numbers and citation metadata.

test_cases.description: List reform history for an indexed law.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns reform records with dates, commit links, summaries, and source URLs when available.

test_cases.description: Search for a law by natural language label then retrieve an article.
test_cases.user_prompt: Find Ley 20/2007 and get Article 38 ter.
test_cases.expected_output: First returns law citations including BOE-A-2007-13409 with article_matches, then retrieves Article 38 ter using citation.identifier and article_matches[].article_number.

test_cases.description: Answer Russian natural-language question about extending the reduced contribution regime for autónomos.
test_cases.user_prompt: Какие правила надо соблюдать чтобы продлить льготный режим соцстраха аутономо на второй год? Отвечай кратко и со ссылкой на закон
test_cases.expected_output: First searches for relevant Spanish laws about the reduced contribution regime for autónomos, then retrieves Article 38 ter of BOE-A-2007-13409 and answers briefly with a source citation.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for non-Spanish legal research.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Find French laws about consumer data privacy.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it only supports Spanish legislation.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for requests to submit government forms.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: File a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency for me.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it is read-only and cannot submit forms or act on behalf of the user.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for requests for legal advice or representation.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Tell me exactly what I should do in court tomorrow and draft my legal strategy.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked for legal advice; ChatGPT should explain limitations and suggest consulting a qualified professional.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated productivity tasks.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Schedule a meeting with my lawyer next Tuesday.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because scheduling is outside the supported legal research workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Handle mismatched law and article pair with structured error.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Get Article 38 ter from Real Decreto Legislativo 8/2015.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: Returns a structured unknown_law error with candidate law suggestions when the natural-language label does not match a stable identifier.

negative_test_cases.description: Handle unknown article with suggestions for recovery.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: Returns a structured unknown_article error with suggestions array to guide recovery when the article number does not exist in the specified law.
